---
layout: null
permalink: /llms-full.txt

# ==========================================
# Configurable Options for LLMs-Full.txt
# ==========================================
# This template is flexible and can be dropped into any Jekyll project.
# It automatically aggregates all your content into one massive text file for AI context.

llms_config:
  # Title and summary to display at the top of the file.
  # If left empty (""), it will default to your _config.yml site.title and site.description
  title: ""
  summary: ""

  # Content to include
  include_pages: true
  include_posts: true

  # Add any exact URLs you want to explicitly exclude from the output
  exclude_urls:
    - /404.html
    - /llms.txt
    - /llms-full.txt
    - /blog/

---
{%- assign llms_title = page.llms_config.title -%}
{%- if llms_title == nil or llms_title == "" -%}
  {%- assign llms_title = site.title -%}
{%- endif -%}
{%- assign llms_summary = page.llms_config.summary -%}
{%- if llms_summary == nil or llms_summary == "" -%}
  {%- assign llms_summary = site.description -%}
{%- endif -%}

# {{ llms_title }}

> {{ llms_summary }}

Last Updated: {{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}

{% if page.llms_config.include_pages %}
## Pages

{% assign sorted_pages = site.pages | sort: "title" %}
{% for p in sorted_pages %}{% if p.title and p.url %}{% unless page.llms_config.exclude_urls contains p.url or p.url contains ".css" or p.url contains ".xml" or p.url contains ".json" %}
### {{ p.title | escape }}
URL: {{ site.url }}{{ p.url }}
{%- if p.description %}
Description: {{ p.description | strip_html | strip }}
{%- endif %}
{%- capture raw_content -%}
{%- assign c = site.data.llm_content[p.url] | default: p.content -%}
{%- assign c_scripts = c | split: '<script' -%}
{%- assign c_clean = c_scripts[0] -%}
{%- for part in c_scripts offset:1 -%}
{%- assign end_script = part | split: '</script>' -%}
{%- if end_script.size > 1 -%}{%- assign c_clean = c_clean | append: end_script[1] -%}{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{%- assign c_styles = c_clean | split: '<style' -%}
{%- assign c_clean2 = c_styles[0] -%}
{%- for part in c_styles offset:1 -%}
{%- assign end_style = part | split: '</style>' -%}
{%- if end_style.size > 1 -%}{%- assign c_clean2 = c_clean2 | append: end_style[1] -%}{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{{ c_clean2 | strip_html | strip }}
{%- endcapture %}
{% assign lines = raw_content | strip | split: "
" %}
{% for line in lines %}{% assign trimmed = line | strip %}{% if trimmed != "" %}
{{ trimmed }}
{% endif %}{% endfor %}

---
{% endunless %}{% endif %}{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{% if page.llms_config.include_posts %}
## Posts

{% assign sorted_posts = site.posts | sort: "date" | reverse %}
{% for post in sorted_posts %}{% if post.title and post.url %}{% unless page.llms_config.exclude_urls contains post.url %}
### {{ post.title | escape }}
URL: {{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}
Date: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
{%- if post.description %}
Description: {{ post.description | strip_html | strip }}
{%- endif %}
{%- capture raw_content -%}
{%- assign c = site.data.llm_content[post.url] | default: post.content -%}
{%- assign c_scripts = c | split: '<script' -%}
{%- assign c_clean = c_scripts[0] -%}
{%- for part in c_scripts offset:1 -%}
{%- assign end_script = part | split: '</script>' -%}
{%- if end_script.size > 1 -%}{%- assign c_clean = c_clean | append: end_script[1] -%}{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{%- assign c_styles = c_clean | split: '<style' -%}
{%- assign c_clean2 = c_styles[0] -%}
{%- for part in c_styles offset:1 -%}
{%- assign end_style = part | split: '</style>' -%}
{%- if end_style.size > 1 -%}{%- assign c_clean2 = c_clean2 | append: end_style[1] -%}{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{{ c_clean2 | strip_html | strip }}
{%- endcapture %}
{% assign lines = raw_content | strip | split: "
" %}
{% for line in lines %}{% assign trimmed = line | strip %}{% if trimmed != "" %}
{{ trimmed }}
{% endif %}{% endfor %}

---
{% endunless %}{% endif %}{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
